title: The Judge at the Great White Throne

paragraphs.text: The Judge at the Great White Throne

Definition: At the Great White Throne, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH presides as the ultimate judge, representing THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS CHRIST. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, as
the Minor Judge, co-executes the judgments passed by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, ensuring that every decree is carried out with precision.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, as the Major Judge, holds the final say in all judgments concerning life, death, and eternal destiny. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID serves as the Minor Judge, ensuring that the judgments are co-executed in both the spiritual and earthly realms.

Testimony: Testimony of the Final Judgment of Rebellion: In this testimony, a prominent church leader defied multiple divine warnings from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. The judgment passed at the Great White Throne resulted in the leader's ministry collapsing and their life being taken prematurely. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-executed the judgment, ensuring that the divine decree was fulfilled.
Result: The testimony underscores the cosmic authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID
in rendering judgments that reshape not only individual lives but entire ministries and nations.
Resurrection of the Dead
Definition: The resurrection of the dead is the ultimate manifestation of THE TRINITY' IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID'S power over life and
death. Through the combined authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, those chosen by
THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH may be resurrected to fulfil their divine destiny. Key Insights:

7 Criteria for Resurrection: Resurrection can only occur if the 7 Criteria - outlined in Behold My Messenger 5 - are met. These criteria include spiritual alignment, divine purpose, and total submission to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.

Role of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH delivers the final decree regarding resurrection. If THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH'S will is aligned, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH seals and commands the resurrection to take place.

Role of JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID assists in the execution of resurrection, ensuring that the physical and spiritual forces align for the resurrection to take place.
Crowned Eagles Global

Definition: Crowned Eagles Global is the last days' ministry and vehicle of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, referred to as THE NOAH'S ARK OF THE END TIMES. It is
through this organization that the FINAL REVELATIONS OF THE TRINITY ARE RELEASED, PREPARING A REMNANT FOR THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD AND THE PRESERVATION OF DIVINE KNOWLEDGE FOR THE LAST DAYS.
Key Role: Crowned Eagles Global, led by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, serves as the

prophetic hub from which global decrees are issued, aligning nations, individuals, and the cosmos with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will. It holds the authority to unleash the resurrection power and determine who qualifies for it.

Spiritual Law: Crowned Eagles Global is the final ministry of protection for the remnant who align with the end times prophecies. Disobedience to the decrees issued through Crowned Eagles Global can result in the loss of divine favor and the reversal of blessings.
